array_cross_product.Name: array_cross_product
array_cross_product.Description: Compute the cross product of two arrays of size 3. The array elements can not be NULL.

array_cosine_similarity.Name: array_cosine_similarity
array_cosine_similarity.Description: Compute the cosine similarity between two arrays of the same size. The array elements can not be NULL. The arrays can have any size as long as the size is the same for both arguments.

array_cosine_distance.Name: array_cosine_distance
array_cosine_distance.Description: Compute the cosine distance between two arrays of the same size. The array elements can not be NULL. The arrays can have any size as long as the size is the same for both arguments.

array_distance.Name: array_distance
array_distance.Description: Compute the distance between two arrays of the same size. The array elements can not be NULL. The arrays can have any size as long as the size is the same for both arguments.

array_inner_product.Name: array_inner_product
array_inner_product.Description: Compute the inner product between two arrays of the same size. The array elements can not be NULL. The arrays can have any size as long as the size is the same for both arguments.

array_negative_inner_product.Name: array_negative_inner_product
array_negative_inner_product.Description: Compute the negative inner product between two arrays of the same size. The array elements can not be NULL. The arrays can have any size as long as the size is the same for both arguments.

array_dot_product.Name: array_inner_product
array_dot_product.Description: Compute the inner product between two arrays of the same size. The array elements can not be NULL. The arrays can have any size as long as the size is the same for both arguments.

array_negative_dot_product.Name: array_negative_inner_product
array_negative_dot_product.Description: Compute the negative inner product between two arrays of the same size. The array elements can not be NULL. The arrays can have any size as long as the size is the same for both arguments.

bit_count.Name: bit_count
bit_count.Description: Returns the number of bits that are set

bit_position.Name: bit_position
bit_position.Description: Returns first starting index of the specified substring within bits, or zero if it is not present. The first (leftmost) bit is indexed 1

get_bit.Name: get_bit
get_bit.Description: Extracts the nth bit from bitstring; the first (leftmost) bit is indexed 0

octet_length.Name: octet_length
octet_length.Description: Number of bytes in `blob`.\1Returns the number of bytes in the `bitstring`.

hex.Name: hex
hex.Description: Converts the string to hexadecimal representation.\1Converts `blob` to `VARCHAR` using hexadecimal encoding.\1Converts the value to hexadecimal representation.

to_hex.Name: hex
to_hex.Description: Converts the string to hexadecimal representation.\1Converts `blob` to `VARCHAR` using hexadecimal encoding.\1Converts the value to hexadecimal representation.

greatest.Name: greatest
greatest.Description: Returns the highest value of the set of input parameters

isfinite.Name: isfinite
isfinite.Description: Returns true if the floating point value is finite, false otherwise

isinf.Name: isinf
isinf.Description: Returns true if the floating point value is infinite, false otherwise

julian.Name: julian
julian.Description: Extract the Julian Day number from a date or timestamp

last_day.Name: last_day
last_day.Description: Returns the last day of the month

least.Name: least
least.Description: Returns the lowest value of the set of input parameters

century.Name: century
century.Description: Extract the century component from a date or timestamp

day.Name: day
day.Description: Extract the day component from a date or timestamp

dayofmonth.Name: dayofmonth
dayofmonth.Description: Extract the dayofmonth component from a date or timestamp

dayofweek.Name: dayofweek
dayofweek.Description: Extract the dayofweek component from a date or timestamp

dayofyear.Name: dayofyear
dayofyear.Description: Extract the dayofyear component from a date or timestamp

decade.Name: decade
decade.Description: Extract the decade component from a date or timestamp

epoch.Name: epoch
epoch.Description: Extract the epoch component from a temporal type

era.Name: era
era.Description: Extract the era component from a date or timestamp

hour.Name: hour
hour.Description: Extract the hour component from a date or timestamp

isodow.Name: isodow
isodow.Description: Extract the isodow component from a date or timestamp

isoyear.Name: isoyear
isoyear.Description: Extract the isoyear component from a date or timestamp

microsecond.Name: microsecond
microsecond.Description: Extract the microsecond component from a date or timestamp

millennium.Name: millennium
millennium.Description: Extract the millennium component from a date or timestamp

millisecond.Name: millisecond
millisecond.Description: Extract the millisecond component from a date or timestamp

minute.Name: minute
minute.Description: Extract the minute component from a date or timestamp

month.Name: month
month.Description: Extract the month component from a date or timestamp

quarter.Name: quarter
quarter.Description: Extract the quarter component from a date or timestamp

second.Name: second
second.Description: Extract the second component from a date or timestamp

timezone_hour.Name: timezone_hour
timezone_hour.Description: Extract the timezone_hour component from a date or timestamp

timezone_minute.Name: timezone_minute
timezone_minute.Description: Extract the timezone_minute component from a date or timestamp

timezone.Name: timezone
timezone.Description: Extract the timezone component from a date or timestamp

week.Name: week
week.Description: Extract the week component from a date or timestamp

weekday.Name: weekday
weekday.Description: Extract the weekday component from a date or timestamp

weekofyear.Name: weekofyear
weekofyear.Description: Extract the weekofyear component from a date or timestamp

year.Name: year
year.Description: Extract the year component from a date or timestamp

yearweek.Name: yearweek
yearweek.Description: Extract the yearweek component from a date or timestamp

list_cosine_similarity.Name: list_cosine_similarity
list_cosine_similarity.Description: Compute the cosine similarity between two lists

list_cosine_distance.Name: list_cosine_distance
list_cosine_distance.Description: Compute the cosine distance between two lists

list_distance.Name: list_distance
list_distance.Description: Compute the distance between two lists

list_dot_product.Name: list_inner_product
list_dot_product.Description: Compute the inner product between two lists

list_negative_dot_product.Name: list_negative_inner_product
list_negative_dot_product.Description: Compute the negative inner product between two lists

acosh.Name: acosh
acosh.Description: Computes the inverse hyperbolic cos of x

asinh.Name: asinh
asinh.Description: Computes the inverse hyperbolic sin of x

atanh.Name: atanh
atanh.Description: Computes the inverse hyperbolic tan of x

cbrt.Name: cbrt
cbrt.Description: Returns the cube root of x

even.Name: even
even.Description: Rounds x to next even number by rounding away from zero

exp.Name: exp
exp.Description: Computes e to the power of x

factorial.Name: !__postfix
factorial.Description: Factorial of x. Computes the product of the current integer and all integers below it

gamma.Name: gamma
gamma.Description: Interpolation of (x-1) factorial (so decimal inputs are allowed)

gcd.Name: greatest_common_divisor
gcd.Description: Computes the greatest common divisor of x and y

greatest_common_divisor.Name: greatest_common_divisor
greatest_common_divisor.Description: Computes the greatest common divisor of x and y

isnan.Name: isnan
isnan.Description: Returns true if the floating point value is not a number, false otherwise

lcm.Name: least_common_multiple
lcm.Description: Computes the least common multiple of x and y

least_common_multiple.Name: least_common_multiple
least_common_multiple.Description: Computes the least common multiple of x and y

lgamma.Name: lgamma
lgamma.Description: Computes the log of the gamma function

ln.Name: ln
ln.Description: Computes the natural logarithm of x

log.Name: log
log.Description: Computes the logarithm of x to base b. b may be omitted, in which case the default 10

nextafter.Name: nextafter
nextafter.Description: Returns the next floating point value after x in the direction of y

pow.Description: Computes x to the power of y

power.Description: Computes x to the power of y

signbit.Name: signbit
signbit.Description: Returns whether the signbit is set or not

sqrt.Name: sqrt
sqrt.Description: Returns the square root of x

ascii.Name: ascii
ascii.Description: Returns an integer that represents the Unicode code point of the first character of the string

bin.Name: bin
bin.Description: Converts the value to binary representation

chr.Name: chr
chr.Description: Returns a character which is corresponding the ASCII code value or Unicode code point

ilike_escape.Name: ilike_escape
ilike_escape.Description: Returns true if the `string` matches the `like_specifier` (see Pattern Matching) using case-insensitive matching. `escape_character` is used to search for wildcard characters in the `string`.

like_escape.Name: like_escape
like_escape.Description: Returns true if the `string` matches the `like_specifier` (see Pattern Matching) using case-sensitive matching. `escape_character` is used to search for wildcard characters in the `string`.

lpad.Name: lpad
lpad.Description: Pads the string with the character from the left until it has count characters

not_ilike_escape.Name: not_ilike_escape
not_ilike_escape.Description: Returns false if the `string` matches the `like_specifier` (see Pattern Matching) using case-insensitive matching. `escape_character` is used to search for wildcard characters in the `string`.

not_like_escape.Name: not_like_escape
not_like_escape.Description: Returns false if the `string` matches the `like_specifier` (see Pattern Matching) using case-sensitive matching. `escape_character` is used to search for wildcard characters in the `string`.

ord.Name: unicode
ord.Description: Returns the unicode codepoint of the first character of the string

rpad.Name: rpad
rpad.Description: Pads the string with the character from the right until it has count characters

starts_with.Description: Returns true if string begins with search_string

to_binary.Name: bin
to_binary.Description: Converts the value to binary representation

unicode.Name: unicode
unicode.Description: Returns the unicode codepoint of the first character of the string

epoch_ms.Name: epoch_ms
epoch_ms.Description: Extract the epoch component in milliseconds from a temporal type

epoch_ns.Name: epoch_ns
epoch_ns.Description: Extract the epoch component in nanoseconds from a temporal type

epoch_us.Name: epoch_us
epoch_us.Description: Extract the epoch component in microseconds from a temporal type

currval.Name: currval
currval.Description: Return the current value of the sequence. Note that nextval must be called at least once prior to calling currval.

nextval.Name: nextval
nextval.Description: Return the following value of the sequence.

uuid_extract_timestamp.Name: uuid_extract_timestamp
uuid_extract_timestamp.Description: Extract the timestamp for the given UUID v7.

uuid_extract_version.Name: uuid_extract_version
uuid_extract_version.Description: Extract a version for the given UUID.
